applicability_notes: Sibling-branch pattern observed in every sinusoidal embedding call site: cos and sin are both computed from the same input tensor 'emb' (timestep * time_proj_factor or position*inv_freq angles), then concatenated along dim=-1. Both branches are eltwise unaries with the torch goldens torch.cos / torch.sin and can be horizontally merged into a single fused kernel pass over the shared input.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, seq_len, head_dim] concatenated sin/cos RoPE tables
placement_observations.source: RoPE precompute call site: ttnn.to_layout(cos/sin, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
